since_last: 50% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.14%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.47% · Gold +1.46% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 50% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.14%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.14%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.53%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +7.27%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +7.27%, TER +7.07%, LRCX +6.44%, MU +6.21%, MRVL +6.02%. Laggards: CRM -4.55%, IBM -4.22%, NOW -4.11%, WDAY -3.76%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.06% at $151.36
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.06% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
